description: The Bahala Na Gang is a Filipino street gang founded in the early 1940s in Sampaloc, Manila, by Divino Talastas. It originated as a protective group against rival gangs and later expanded into criminal activities including drug and weapons trafficking. The gang spread to the United States and remains active, with alliances including Nuestra Familia.

country_links.evidence_quote: as well as the Las Vegas area in Nevada .
country_links.context: The Bahala Na Gang has sets in the Las Vegas area in Nevada.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Bahala Na Gang spread into Filipino immigrant communities in the United States, especially California .
country_links.context: The Bahala Na Gang spread into Filipino immigrant communities in the United States, especially California, with sets emerging in multiple cities.
